tasks.name: Apply memberIdentifier to all 15 affected tools
tasks.notes: All 15 tools updated: remove_member, update_member, send_files, execute_prompt, execute_command, provision_auth, setup_ssh_key, provision_vcs_auth, revoke_vcs_auth, member_detail, update_llm_cli, compose_permissions, cloud_control, monitor_task, update_task_tokens. tasks.name: VERIFY Phase 1
tasks.notes: BUILD: pass. TESTS: 39 files, 613 passed, 3 skipped. reset_session: not found in src/. getAgentOrFail in tools/: not found. Pushed to origin.

tasks.name: send_files: rename remote_subfolder to destination_path + path security
tasks.notes: Renamed remote_subfolder→destination_path in schema+handler. Added work_folder boundary check (posix for remote, path.resolve for local). Updated strategy interface, file-transfer.ts, sftp.ts. Fixed update-task-tokens.ts usage.

tasks.name: Implement receive_files tool
tasks.notes: Created src/tools/receive-files.ts with memberIdentifier, remote_paths[], local_destination. Added receiveFiles() to AgentStrategy interface, LocalStrategy (fs.copyFile), RemoteStrategy (sftp.fastGet via downloadViaSFTP). Added downloadFiles to file-transfer.ts and downloadViaSFTP to sftp.ts. Registered in index.ts after send_files.

tasks.name: Fix execute_prompt and execute_command descriptions
tasks.notes: execute_prompt: removed 'remote' from 'Run an LLM prompt on a remote member'. execute_command: removed 'spinning up' → 'without an LLM session'.

tasks.name: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: BUILD: pass. TESTS: 39 files, 611 passed, 3 skipped. receive_files registered in index.ts. remote_subfolder: not found in src/. Pushed to origin.

tasks.name: Remove cloud_ssh_key_path parameter
tasks.notes: Removed cloud_ssh_key_path from register_member and update_member schemas. Removed sshKeyPath from CloudConfig (aws.ts never used it). Cloud members now use key_path for both SSH and lifecycle. Updated 7 test files. Build and tests pass.

tasks.name: VERIFY Phase 3
